Document:
# Weapons & Ammo
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Weapons"]
Weapons in Nuclear 14 range from improvised pistols to military-grade energy guns and heavy weapons. Ammunition matters just as much as the weapon itself, so learn what your gear uses before you head into a fight.
## Weapon Families
This section is split into weapon categories so you can quickly find the type of gear you are looking for.
[color=#a4885c]Ranged Weapons[/color]: firearms, energy guns, and heavy weapons.
[color=#a4885c]Melee Weapons[/color]: knives, clubs, spears, and other close-combat gear.
[color=#a4885c]Explosives[/color]: grenades, launchers, mines, and demolition tools.
## Ammunition Basics
Always match the weapon to the correct magazine, cartridge, cell, or shell. Running dry in the middle of a fight is usually fatal.
[bold]9mm Magazine[/bold] — Feeds 9mm pistols and some SMGs.
[bold]10mm Magazine[/bold] — Standard magazine for 10mm pistols and SMGs.
[bold]5.56 Magazine[/bold] — Feeds most military rifles and carbines.
[bold]7.62 Magazine[/bold] — Used by Chinese rifles and heavier automatics.
See the sub-sections for detailed guides on [color=#a4885c]Ranged Weapons[/color] and the weapon categories under them.
